title: Do you recognise these dogs?
description: GEORGE NEWS - These two beautiful dogs were...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - These two beautiful dogs were picked up by staff members of Oudtshoorn Dogs in Need (Odin) near the bridge at the Fancourt hotel in Blanco on Monday 19 February.


> They have not been claimed and are currently kept at the Odin kennels at Tantivvey Guest Farm in Blanco.


If anyone knows who these precious pups belong to, please contact Odin on 072 084 1374.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
